title: Qiagen DNeasy 96 blood & tissue protocol for bee guts
steps: UV sterilize supplies for 2 96 well plates worth of extractions: 1 50mL centrifuge tube, 1 15mL centrifuge tube, 1 box 1,000uL pipette tips, 2 boxes 200uL pipette tips, 24 elution microtube strip caps, steel beads, zirconia beads, and 1 reagent reservoir
Combine 36 mL Buffer ATL (tissue lysis buffer) Qiagen Catalog #19076 and 4000 µL Proteinase K (2 ml) Qiagen Catalog #19131 in 50mL centrifuge tube, invert gently to mix
Add 200 µL ATL + Proteinase K solution to each sample
Add ~ 100 µL zirconia beads and 2 steel beads to each sample

Place plates in tissue lyser and run at 30 Hz for 00:02:30 , then rotate plates 180 degrees and lyse at 30 Hz for an additional 00:02:30 TissueLyser II (Bead Mill, QIAGEN, 85300, https://www.qiagen.com/us/products/human-id-and-forensics/automation/tissuelyser-ii/#orderinginformation ) TissueLyser Adapter Set 2 x 96 (Adapter set, Qiagen, 69984, https://www.qiagen.com/us/products/instruments-and-automation/accessories/tissuelyser-adapter-sets/?catno=69984 )

Centrifuge on "short" for 00:00:07 then shake by hand for 00:00:15 Eppendorf™ 5810R Centrifuge (Centrifuge, Eppendorf, 02-262-8187, https://www.fishersci.com/shop/products/eppendorf-5810r-centrifuge-rotor-packages-16/022628187 )
Incubate 56 °C for 01:00:00 with weight on top of plate Note: remove from incubator carefully with weight on top so that caps do not pop off
Place plates in tissue lyser and run at 30 Hz for 00:01:00
Incubate 56 °C overnight with weight on top of plate

UV sterilize supplies: 4 reagent reservoirs, 24 elution microtube strip caps (clear), 2 boxes 1,000uL tips (plus some extra), 6 boxes 200uL tips (plus some extra), 2 s-blocks, 2 elution microtube plates (dark blue) and 24 strip caps (white), and 6 96 well microplates (for aliquotting final product). Label 6 foil microplate lids for aliquots
Carefully remove plates from incubator, leaving the weight on top, and allow to sit at room temperature for a few minutes before carefully removing weight to ensure strip caps do not pop off
Shake plates by hand for 00:00:15 , rotating plates halfway through
Centrifuge on "short" for 00:00:07
Add 410 µL ALE to each sample
Seal with new caps and shake by hand for 00:00:15 , rotating plates halfway through
Centrifuge on "short" for 00:00:07
Place DNeasy filter plates on top of s-blocks
Transfer lysate to DNeasy filter plate and seal with AirPore tape
Centrifuge 3486 x g, °C, 13 minutes . Discard flowthrough
Add 500 µL Buffer AW1 Qiagen Catalog #19081 to each sample, seal with AirPore tape Buffer AW1 contains guanidine salt - do not mix with bleach
Centrifuge 3486 x g, °C, 8 minutes . Discard flowthrough
Add 500 µL Buffer AW2 Qiagen Catalog #19072 , do not seal Manage and dispose of buffer AW2 as hazardous waste
Centrifuge 3486 x g, °C, 20 minutes . Discard flowthrough
Repeat steps 22 and 23
Place DNeasy filter plate on top of elution microtube plate (dark blue)
Add 55 µL Buffer AE Qiagen Catalog #19077 to each sample
Incubate at room temperature for 00:01:00
Centrifuge 3486 x g, °C, 5 minutes
Aliquot entirety of product into 3 96 well microplates per DNA plate, seal with labeled foil lids and store at -20 °C
For a second backup elution, add 50 µL Buffer AE Qiagen Catalog #19077 to each sample
Incubate at room temperature for 00:01:00
Centrifuge 3486 x g, °C, 5 minutes
Seal with white strip caps
Store at -20 °C
creator: Jocelynz
